global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with abstract shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute savings on hotels and flights.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop for the other elements.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of abstract shapes, including a large rectangle and a circle, positioned centrally on the ad.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: A smaller rectangle overlaying the abstract shapes, adding depth and interest to the design.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle positioned towards the bottom center, serving as a decorative element.

elements.label: Small dot
elements.description: A small dot located near the bottom, complementing the other shapes in the design.

elements.label: Savings message
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Last-minute savings Hotels flights in one tap' prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Last-minute savings Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: The brand name 'RouteBloom' is displayed in a large, bold font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Learn more' in white, positioned at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge displaying '30%' in white text, located at the bottom left corner of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern minimalist with bold text, promoting last-minute savings.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Last-minute savings Hotels flights in one tap, RouteBloom, Learn more, 30%
